note: Curve liquidity gauges — 8 mainnet pool gauges (tied to onboarded pools). 8 cover + 14 exclude (ERC20 gauge-token / admin / keeper). Multi-address (H1).

0xc4d66de8.name: initialize(address)
0xc4d66de8.reason: factory init, not a user op.

0x33134583.name: claimable_tokens(address)
0x33134583.reason: view-like (state-updating getter), not a user write.

0xe6f1daf2.name: claim_rewards()
0xe6f1daf2.reason: user gauge stake/unstake/claim (staking domain) — GaugeDeposit/GaugeWithdraw (LP identified by gauge venue) / ClaimRewards (gauge multi-reward, no reward_token). Multi-address: one manifest covers all 8 pool gauges.
